<!-- Thanks for contributing! Please fill out the sections below. -->

## Summary
<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Content (notes, articles)
- [ ] Site styling / layout
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other (describe)

## Linked issues
<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Validation
<!-- How did you verify this works? Screenshots welcome for visual changes. -->
- [ ] Built locally with `npm run build` (or `npx quartz build --serve`)
- [ ] Verified on desktop (light & dark)
- [ ] Verified on mobile (where relevant)

## Checklist
- [ ] No private notes / vault content accidentally included
- [ ] Linear history (rebase / squash, no merge commits into the branch)
